hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path') && if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(js|jsx)$'; then cd /Users/frankf/GitHub/Greedy-Expense-Tracker && npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi || true
